headline: Goldman Sachs massively resets Snowflake stock price target for 2026
summary: In February and March 2026, Snowflake was the stock Wall Street couldn't quite figure out. The stock was down 50% from the early January high to early April 2026, according to TradingView data. Snowflake was caught between a decelerating core business and an AI narrative that kept getting pushed ...
